name: Path Traversal: '/dir/../filename'
description: The product does not properly neutralize '/dir/../filename' sequences in user-supplied pathnames, where the traversal is embedded after an initial directory reference, allowing access outside restricted directories.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides path data containing '/dir/../' patterns that flows to STORAGE[file_access] without a CONTROL node performing full path canonicalization and directory containment validation after resolving all relative segments
